welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to Bio-Data OS
welcome.desc: A 30-second tour of the main screen. The left sidebar is your workspace nav — just follow the highlights. Click "?" top-right anytime to replay.

projects.title: ① Projects
projects.desc: Everything starts with a project — the boundary container for data and permissions. Files, drug assets and datasets all live inside projects.

newProject.title: ② New project
newProject.desc: Create your first project here. Leave the org unset and it lands in "My Workspace" — zero setup to get going.

orgs.title: ③ Organizations
orgs.desc: Organizations are for grouping and collaboration: invite members, share projects, and maintain org-level shared asset types and data.

audit.title: ④ Audit
audit.desc: Who did what, when, to which item — fully logged with a tamper-evident hash chain. Your tool for compliance and troubleshooting.

end.title: 🎉 You're ready
end.desc: Go create a project. Once inside, you'll get a second short tour of the core workflow. Click "?" top-right to replay anytime.

welcome.title: 📦 Inside a project
welcome.desc: This is your project workbench. Here's the core flow: from entering data to generating an AI-ready dataset.

registry.title: ① Drug Assets
registry.desc: Define asset types (compound, antibody…) and enter records here. Sensitive fields (smiles/sequence) are masked by default and granted on demand.

datasets.title: ② Datasets
datasets.desc: Datasets are the AI-ready output — with tags/author/references, versions and lineage.

convert.title: ③ Data to dataset
convert.desc: On the Drug Assets page, click "To dataset": pick fields and turn asset records into a masked dataset in one click, with lineage recorded. That's the core loop!
